title: Document metadata validation and schema handling
purpose: Provides runtime validation for document metadata and annotations, ensuring data integrity while allowing schema evolution.
module_context: Exports types for AnnotationKind, Annotation, and DocumentMetadata. Defines constants CURRENT_METADATA_VERSION and EMPTY_METADATA. Includes helper functions isAnnotationKind and validateAnnotation for internal validation logic.

steps.content: Check if the input value equals 'comment'.
Check if the input value equals 'proposed'.
Check if the input value equals 'approved'.
Check if the input value equals 'rejected'.
Return true if any of the above checks pass, otherwise return false.
Verify that the input is an object and not null.
Check that the annotation has a valid string ID.
Validate that the annotation kind is one of the allowed values.
Ensure the anchor property exists and is an object.
Validate that the anchor has numeric from and to properties, and string text and checksum properties.
Confirm that the body is a string.
Verify that the created at timestamp is a number.
Construct and return a validated annotation object with all required fields.
If optional fields are present, include them in the validated annotation.
Ensure the input is an object and not null.
Initialize an output metadata object with empty annotations and schema version.
If the annotations array exists, process each item through the annotation validation function.
Collect all valid annotations into the output object.
If the schema version is a number, include it in the output.
Copy all other properties from the input to the output, skipping annotations and schema version.
